name: windy-plugin-xcgram
description: Interactive aerological sounding (Skew-T log-P) with plain-language explanations for free-flight and XC pilots, built on Windy forecast data.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && SERVE=false rollup -c && cp package.json dist/
scripts.build:win: (if exist dist rmdir /s /q dist) && mkdir dist && set "SERVE=false" && rollup -c && copy package.json dist\
scripts.build:all-examples: for number in 01 02 03 04 05 06; do CONFIG=example$number SERVE=false rollup -c; done

author: xcgram
